<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8"><style rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">@charset "utf-8";

:root { --navy: #1B2A80; --navy-dark: #0F1B5C; --navy-deeper: #0A1340; --green: #7AB800; --green-light: #8FD400; --green-dark: #5E9000; --green-glow: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.4); --black: #1A1A1A; --white: #FFFFFF; --gray-50: #F8F9FC; --gray-100: #F0F2F7; --gray-200: #E2E5EE; --gray-300: #C8CDD9; --gray-400: #9CA3B5; --gray-500: #6B7280; --gray-600: #4B5563; --gray-700: #374151; --gray-800: #1F2937; --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(27, 42, 128, 0.06); --shadow-md: 0 4px 20px rgba(27, 42, 128, 0.08); --shadow-lg: 0 8px 40px rgba(27, 42, 128, 0.12); --shadow-xl: 0 20px 60px rgba(27, 42, 128, 0.18); --shadow-green: 0 4px 20px rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.3); --radius-sm: 0.5rem; --radius-md: 0.75rem; --radius-lg: 1rem; --radius-xl: 1.5rem; --radius-2xl: 2rem; --radius-full: 100px; --transition: 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); --transition-slow: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); --transition-bounce: 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); }

*, ::before, ::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

body { font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; color: var(--gray-700); background: var(--white); line-height: 1.6; overflow-x: hidden; }

img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }

a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; }

ul { list-style: none; }

.container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; padding: 0px 24px; }

.scroll-progress { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 3px; width: 0px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), var(--green-light)); z-index: 10000; transition: width 0.1s linear; box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--green-glow); }

.reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); }

.reveal.revealed { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0px); }

.reveal--delay-1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }

.reveal--delay-2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }

.reveal--delay-3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }

h1, h2, h3, h4 { color: var(--navy); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.03em; }

h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5.5vw, 3.75rem); font-weight: 900; }

h2 { font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 4vw, 2.875rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }

h3 { font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 2vw, 1.375rem); font-weight: 600; }

p { font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.7; }

.section-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--green-dark); margin-bottom: 1rem; }

.section-label::before { content: ""; width: 28px; height: 2px; background: var(--green); border-radius: 1px; }

.btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.875rem 2rem; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-full); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition); white-space: nowrap; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }

.btn--primary { background: var(--green); color: var(--white); box-shadow: var(--shadow-green); }

.btn--primary::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: -100%; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2), transparent); transition: left 0.5s; }

.btn--primary:hover::before { left: 100%; }

.btn--primary:hover { background: var(--green-dark); box-shadow: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.45) 0px 6px 30px; }

.btn--glow { animation: 3s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal none running btnGlow; }

@keyframes btnGlow { 
  0%, 100% { box-shadow: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.3) 0px 4px 20px; }
  50% { box-shadow: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.5) 0px 4px 30px, rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.15) 0px 0px 60px; }
}

.btn--large { padding: 1rem 2.5rem; font-size: 1.0625rem; }

.btn--icon svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; transition: transform var(--transition); }

.btn--icon:hover svg { transform: translateX(4px); }

.section-curve { position: absolute; bottom: -1px; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 3; }

.section-curve svg { display: block; width: 100%; height: 80px; }

.header { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 1000; padding: 1.25rem 0px; transition: var(--transition); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) 0px 1px 0px; }

.header--scrolled { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(180%); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.06), var(--shadow-md); padding: 0.75rem 0px; }

.header__inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }

.header__logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; }

.header__logo-icon { height: 36px; width: auto; }

.header__logo-text { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--black); letter-spacing: -0.02em; transition: var(--transition); }

.header__nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2.25rem; }

.header__nav a { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--gray-600); transition: var(--transition); position: relative; padding: 0.25rem 0px; }

.header__nav a::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 50%; width: 0px; height: 2px; background: var(--green); transition: var(--transition); transform: translateX(-50%); border-radius: 1px; }

.header__nav a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

.header__nav a:hover { color: var(--navy); }

.header__cta .btn--primary { padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }

.header__hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px; z-index: 1001; }

.header__hamburger span { width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--navy); border-radius: 2px; transition: var(--transition); transform-origin: center center; }

.header__hamburger.active span:nth-child(1) { transform: rotate(45deg) translate(5px, 6px); }

.header__hamburger.active span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; }

.header__hamburger.active span:nth-child(3) { transform: rotate(-45deg) translate(5px, -6px); }

.mobile-nav { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0px; background: var(--navy-deeper); z-index: 999; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 2rem; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transition: var(--transition); }

.mobile-nav.active { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; }

.mobile-nav a { font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--white); font-weight: 500; }

.mobile-nav .btn--primary { margin-top: 1rem; }

.hero { position: relative; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; overflow: hidden; padding: 120px 0px 60px; }

.hero__bg { position: absolute; inset: 0px; z-index: 0; }

.hero__bg-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center center; }

.hero__bg-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(10, 19, 64, 0.88) 0%, rgba(15, 27, 92, 0.82) 40%, rgba(27, 42, 128, 0.75) 70%, rgba(27, 42, 128, 0.65) 100%); }

.hero__orb { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; filter: blur(80px); will-change: transform; z-index: 1; }

.hero__orb--1 { width: 500px; height: 500px; background: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.1); top: -10%; right: -5%; animation: 12s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal none running orbFloat; }

.hero__orb--2 { width: 400px; height: 400px; background: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.06); bottom: -15%; left: -8%; animation: 15s ease-in-out 0s infinite reverse none running orbFloat; }

@keyframes orbFloat { 
  0%, 100% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) scale(1); }
  33% { transform: translate(30px, -30px) scale(1.05); }
  66% { transform: translate(-20px, 20px) scale(0.95); }
}

.hero__layout { position: relative; z-index: 2; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr; gap: 3.5rem; align-items: center; }

.hero__badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.25); padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius: var(--radius-full); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--green-light); margin-bottom: 1.75rem; position: relative; }

.hero__badge svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; margin-left: 12px; }

.hero__badge-pulse { position: absolute; left: 12px; width: 8px; height: 8px; background: var(--green); border-radius: 50%; animation: 2s ease 0s infinite normal none running pulse; }

@keyframes pulse { 
  0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 var(--green-glow); }
  70% { box-shadow: transparent 0px 0px 0px 12px; }
  100% { box-shadow: transparent 0px 0px 0px 0px; }
}

.hero__title { color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }

.hero__title-line { display: block; }

.hero__title-accent { background-image: ; background-position-x: ; background-position-y: ; background-size: ; background-repeat: ; background-attachment: ; background-origin: ; background-color: ; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; }

.hero__sub { font-size: 1.125rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75); margin-bottom: 2.25rem; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 540px; }

.hero__actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }

.hero__right { position: relative; }

.hero__card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(150%); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); padding: 2rem; transition: transform 0.5s; }

.hero__card-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 1.25rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; }

.hero__card-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: var(--green); border-radius: 50%; animation: 2s ease 0s infinite normal none running pulse; }

.hero__card-feature { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.875rem; padding: 0.75rem 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); }

.hero__card-feature:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

.hero__card-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; min-width: 36px; background: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.12); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }

.hero__card-icon svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; color: var(--green); }

.hero__card-feature h4 { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.125rem; }

.hero__card-feature p { font-size: 0.8125rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); line-height: 1.4; }

.hero__float { position: absolute; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 0.625rem 1rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; animation: 6s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal none running float; z-index: 5; }

.hero__float--1 { top: 10px; right: -10px; animation-delay: 0s; }

.hero__float--2 { bottom: -20px; left: 50px; animation-delay: 2s; }

.hero__float-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--green-glow); }

.hero__float span { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); }

@keyframes float { 
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-12px); }
}

.hero__stats-bar { position: relative; z-index: 2; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0px; margin-top: 4rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(150%); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: var(--radius-2xl); padding: 2rem 3rem; }

.hero__stat { text-align: center; flex: 1 1 0%; }

.hero__stat-divider { width: 1px; height: 48px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); margin: 0px 1.5rem; }

.hero__stat-value { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--green); letter-spacing: -0.02em; display: inline; line-height: 1; }

.hero__stat-suffix { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green-light); display: inline; }

.hero__stat-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-top: 0.25rem; }

.problem { padding: 100px 0px; background: var(--gray-50); position: relative; }

.problem__layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3.5rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; }

.problem__left { position: sticky; top: 120px; align-self: start; }

.problem__desc { color: var(--gray-500); margin-top: 1.25rem; font-size: 1.0625rem; }

.problem__image-block { margin-top: 2rem; position: relative; border-radius: var(--radius-xl); overflow: hidden; }

.problem__image { width: 100%; height: 280px; object-fit: cover; transition: transform var(--transition-slow); }

.problem__image-block:hover .problem__image { transform: scale(1.03); }

.problem__right { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; }

.problem__card { background: var(--white); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--gray-200); transition: var(--transition); position: relative; overflow: hidden; cursor: default; }

.problem__card-number { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--gray-100); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; transition: var(--transition); }

.problem__card:hover .problem__card-number { color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1); }

.problem__card::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 3px; height: 0px; background: linear-gradient(rgb(239, 68, 68), rgb(249, 115, 22)); transition: height var(--transition); }

.problem__card:hover { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); }

.problem__card:hover::after { height: 100%; }

.problem__card-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; background: rgb(254, 242, 242); border-radius: var(--radius-md); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; transition: var(--transition); }

.problem__card:hover .problem__card-icon { background: rgb(254, 226, 226); transform: scale(1.05); }

.problem__card-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; color: rgb(239, 68, 68); }

.problem__card h3 { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }

.problem__card p { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--gray-500); line-height: 1.5; }

.problem__cta { text-align: center; }

.problem__cta-inner { background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--gray-200); border-radius: var(--radius-2xl); padding: 2.5rem; display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 1.25rem; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }

.problem__soundbite { font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); }

.guide { padding: 100px 0px; background: var(--white); }

.guide__top { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }

.guide__header p { color: var(--gray-500); margin-top: 1rem; }

.guide__highlight { font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy); margin-top: 0.75rem; display: block; }

.guide__hero-image { border-radius: var(--radius-2xl); overflow: hidden; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); position: relative; }

.guide__image { width: 100%; height: 340px; object-fit: cover; transition: transform var(--transition-slow); }

.guide__hero-image:hover .guide__image { transform: scale(1.03); }

.guide__features { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }

.guide__feature { display: flex; gap: 1.25rem; padding: 1.75rem; background: var(--gray-50); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); border: 1px solid var(--gray-100); transition: var(--transition); cursor: default; }

.guide__feature:hover { background: var(--white); border-color: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.3); box-shadow: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.08) 0px 8px 30px; }

.guide__feature--wide { grid-column: 1 / -1; flex-wrap: wrap; }

.guide__feature-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; min-width: 48px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green), var(--green-light)); border-radius: var(--radius-md); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.25) 0px 4px 12px; transition: var(--transition); }

.guide__feature:hover .guide__feature-icon { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(-5deg); }

.guide__feature-icon svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; color: var(--white); }

.guide__feature h3 { font-size: 1.0625rem; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 0.375rem; }

.guide__feature p { font-size: 0.9375rem; color: var(--gray-500); line-height: 1.6; }

.guide__feature-cities { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; width: 100%; margin-top: 0.5rem; padding-left: 72px; }

.guide__city-tag { padding: 0.375rem 1rem; background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--gray-200); border-radius: var(--radius-full); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy); transition: var(--transition); }

.guide__city-tag:hover { background: var(--navy); color: var(--white); border-color: var(--navy); }

.guide__stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-dark), var(--navy)); border-radius: var(--radius-2xl); overflow: hidden; position: relative; }

.guide__stats::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E%3Cg fill='%23ffffff' fill-opacity='0.03'%3E%3Cpath d='M36 34v-4h-2v4h-4v2h4v4h2v-4h4v-2h-4zm0-30V0h-2v4h-4v2h4v4h2V6h4V4h-4zM6 34v-4H4v4H0v2h4v4h2v-4h4v-2H6zM6 4V0H4v4H0v2h4v4h2V6h4V4H6z'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E"); }

.guide__stat { text-align: center; padding: 3rem 1.5rem; position: relative; }

.guide__stat:not(:last-child)::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 25%; right: 0px; height: 50%; width: 1px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); }

.guide__stat-value { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--green); letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; display: inline; }

.guide__stat-suffix { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green-light); display: inline; }

.guide__stat-label { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-weight: 500; margin-top: 0.5rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }

.guide__cta { text-align: center; margin-top: 3.5rem; }

.plan { padding: 100px 0px; background: var(--gray-50); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }

.plan__bg-image { position: absolute; inset: 0px; opacity: 0.03; }

.plan__bg-image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

.plan__header { text-align: center; max-width: 600px; margin: 0px auto 4rem; position: relative; z-index: 2; }

.plan__steps { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; gap: 0px; position: relative; z-index: 2; }

.plan__step-connector { display: flex; align-items: center; padding-top: 40px; opacity: 0.5; }

.plan__step { text-align: center; position: relative; flex: 1 1 0%; max-width: 320px; padding: 2rem; background: var(--white); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); border: 1px solid var(--gray-200); transition: var(--transition); }

.plan__step:hover { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl); }

.plan__step-number { width: 80px; height: 80px; margin: 0px auto 1.5rem; background: var(--gray-50); border: 2px solid var(--green); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.08) 0px 0px 0px 8px; transition: var(--transition); }

.plan__step:hover .plan__step-number { background: var(--green); box-shadow: rgba(122, 184, 0, 0.12) 0px 0px 0px 12px; transform: scale(1.08); }

.plan__step:hover .plan__step-num { color: var(--white); }

.plan__step:hover .plan__step-icon svg { color: var(--white); }

.plan__step-num { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--green); letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: var(--transition); }

.plan__step-icon { margin-top: 0.125rem; }

.plan__step-icon svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; color: var(--navy); transition: var(--transition); }

.plan__step h3 { font-size: 1.125rem; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }

.plan__step p { font-size: 0.9375rem; color: var(--gray-500); line-height: 1.6; }

.plan__cta { text-align: center; margin-top: 3.5rem; position: relative; z-index: 2; }

.success { padding: 100px 0px; background: var(--white); }

.success__header { max-width: 650px; margin-bottom: 3rem; }

.success__header p { color: var(--gray-500); margin-top: 1rem; }

.success__grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; }

.success__card { border-radius: var(--radius-xl); background: var(--gray-50); border: 1px solid var(--gray-100); overflow: hidden; transition: var(--transition); cursor: default; }

.success__card:hover { background: var(--white); border-color: transparent; box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl); }

.success__card-image { overflow: hidden; height: 200px; }

.success__card-image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform var(--transition-slow); }

.success__card:hover .success__card-image img { transform: scale(1.06); }

.success__card-body { padding: 1.75rem; }

.success__card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }

.success__card-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; min-width: 44px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(27, 42, 128, 0.08), rgba(27, 42, 128, 0.04)); border-radius: var(--radius-md); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: var(--transition); }

.success__card:hover .success__card-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green), var(--green-light)); }

.success__card-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; color: var(--navy); transition: var(--transition); }

.success__card:hover .success__card-icon svg { color: var(--white); }

.success__card h3 { font-size: 1.0625rem; color: var(--navy); }

.success__card p { font-size: 0.9375rem; color: var(--gray-500); line-height: 1.6; }

.cta { padding: 120px 0px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }

.cta__bg-image { position: absolute; inset: 0px; }

.cta__bg-image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

  <script>
    const scrollProgress = document.getElementById('scrollProgress');
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      const scrollTop = document.documentElement.scrollTop;
      const scrollHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - document.documentElement.clientHeight;
      scrollProgress.style.width = (scrollTop / scrollHeight) * 100 + '%';
    });
    const header = document.getElementById('header');
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { header.classList.toggle('header--scrolled', window.scrollY > 50); });
    const hamburger = document.getElementById('hamburger');
    const mobileNav = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
    hamburger.addEventListener('click', () => {
      mobileNav.classList.toggle('active');
      hamburger.classList.toggle('active');
      document.body.style.overflow = mobileNav.classList.contains('active') ? 'hidden' : '';
    });
    function closeMobileNav() {
      mobileNav.classList.remove('active');
      hamburger.classList.remove('active');
      document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
      anchor.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
        if (target) {
          e.preventDefault();
          window.scrollTo({ top: target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - 80, behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
      });
    });
    const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(entry => { if (entry.isIntersecting) { entry.target.classList.add('revealed'); revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));
    function animateCounters(entries) {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
        entry.target.querySelectorAll('[data-count]').forEach(counter => {
          if (counter.dataset.animated) return;
          counter.dataset.animated = 'true';
          const target = parseFloat(counter.dataset.count);
          const isFloat = target % 1 !== 0;
          const duration = 2000;
          const startTime = performance.now();
          function update(currentTime) {
            const elapsed = currentTime - startTime;
            const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
            const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 4);
            const current = target * eased;
            if (target >= 1000) counter.textContent = Math.floor(current).toLocaleString();
            else if (isFloat) counter.textContent = current.toFixed(1);
            else counter.textContent = Math.floor(current);
            if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(update);
          }
          requestAnimationFrame(update);
        });
      });
    }
    const counterObserver = new IntersectionObserver(animateCounters, { threshold: 0.3 });
    document.querySelectorAll('.hero__stats-bar, .guide__stats').forEach(el => counterObserver.observe(el));
    document.querySelectorAll('.tilt-card').forEach(card => {
      card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
        const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
        const rotateX = ((e.clientY - rect.top) - rect.height / 2) / (rect.height / 2) * -4;
        const rotateY = ((e.clientX - rect.left) - rect.width / 2) / (rect.width / 2) * 4;
        card.style.transform = `perspective(1000px) rotateX(${rotateX}deg) rotateY(${rotateY}deg) scale3d(1.02, 1.02, 1.02)`;
      });
      card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { card.style.transform = 'perspective(1000px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0) scale3d(1, 1, 1)'; });
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.magnetic-btn').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
        const rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
        btn.style.transform = `translate(${(e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) * 0.15}px, ${(e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) * 0.15}px)`;
      });
      btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { btn.style.transform = 'translate(0, 0)'; });
    });
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      const scrollY = window.pageYOffset;
      document.querySelectorAll('.hero__orb').forEach((orb, i) => { orb.style.transform = `translateY(${scrollY * (i + 1) * 0.03}px)`; });
    });
  </script>



</body></html>

data.summary: FlexiPL is Australia's first on-demand pallet storage marketplace, designed for importers needing flexible, short-term storage solutions without long-term contracts. Key features include instant activation, transparent daily pricing, and real-time tracking of pallet storage. The platform addresses common storage challenges faced by importers, such as the inability to mobilize quickly, peak season demand, locked-in leases, and hidden fees. Users can get an instant quote, choose additional services, and book storage easily online. FlexiPL serves multiple Australian cities, offering solutions for container overflow, new importer mobilization, pre-season staging, and adapting to changing logistics needs. A free trial is available for new users.
